headline: Jim Cramer Believes Marriott Vacations “Is a Long-Term Winner” But Prefers Marriott Hotels
summary: Marriott Vacations Worldwide Corporation (NYSE:VAC) was among Jim Cramer’s stock calls on Mad Money, as he advised investors to stick with the largest tech companies in the market. A caller inquired whether it is too late to get into the stock, noting that it is up around 70% in 2026. Cramer replied: No, it’s not. […]
